use clap::Parser;
use std::path::PathBuf;

const MAX_SCAN_PATHS: usize = 16;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, num_args = 1..=MAX_SCAN_PATHS)]
    paths: Vec<PathBuf>,

    #[arg(long)]
    max_depth: Option<usize>,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<(), String> {
    let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();
    for path in &cli.paths {
        let canonical = path
            .canonicalize()
            .map_err(|e| format!("invalid path {}: {e}", path.display()))?;
        if !seen.insert(canonical.clone()) {
            return Err(format!("duplicate path: {}", canonical.display()));
        }
    }
    for path in &cli.paths {
        let depth = cli.max_depth.unwrap_or(32);
        for entry in walkdir::WalkDir::new(path).max_depth(depth) {
            let entry = entry.map_err(|e| format!("walk error: {e}"))?;
            let _ = std::fs::read_to_string(entry.path());
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}
